# Project Status

_Updated by: Lead agent_ &nbsp;·&nbsp; _When: 2026-07-15 (planning pass 3)_

## Phase

**build** — Phase 1–6 (engine + UI scaffold) is fully built and closed out (#4–#30 all CLOSED
except #31/#38 below). Project is now in a **post-MVP feedback/hardening loop**: client is
playing the running simulation and filing bug reports / feature requests directly as issues
(#32–#44, with #32 CLOSED/karen-PASSED), and the team is also fixing its own dispatcher
infrastructure (#46–#54, see new finding below).

## ⚠️ New this pass — dispatcher lets a stuck low-numbered issue starve the whole queue

Worker selection in `scripts/dispatcher.sh` always picks the **oldest-numbered** open
`agent-todo` issue. When an issue fails karen and gets relabeled back to `agent-todo`, it keeps
the same number, so it stays "oldest" and gets re-picked on the very next pass — ahead of every
higher-numbered issue. Confirmed happening live: **#33 failed karen twice in a row this pass**
(10:53, 11:22) and, being the lowest open `agent-todo` number, was blocking **#52 (URGENT git
cleanup)** and everything else from ever being dispatched — #52 has sat with zero worker
attempts across multiple lead passes for exactly this reason. Filed **#54 (agent-todo)** —
root-cause fix: add fairness (round-robin / least-recently-attempted / cooldown) to worker
selection. Also fixed the immediate symptom this pass:
- Moved **#33 to `agent-backlog`, `depends_on: #52`** — this both breaks the starvation (dispatcher
  now moves on to #34 and beyond) and is factually correct: #33's last two FAILs both cited its
  diff being entangled with #32's uncommitted files, which #52 exists to fix. Also narrowed #33's
  "Done when" — a full 1000-tick multi-species non-collapse guarantee was scope creep; that's a
  broader balance problem tracked separately across #34/#39/#40/#43/#44.

The prior-pass finding about **no `git add`/`git commit` step anywhere in dispatcher.sh** (root
cause of the #32/#33 entanglement in the first place) is still open, tracked by #52 (one-time
cleanup) and #53 (root-cause fix going forward). Working tree is still dirty exactly as
described last pass — #52 has not been dispatched yet; it should be next now that #33 is out of
the `agent-todo` pool.

## What this project is

Project Origins: a persistent ecosystem simulation where players guide life evolution through
species creation and environmental stewardship. MVP is a deterministic, local-first evolution
sandbox validating player attachment and emergent adaptation.

## Client decisions (all answered — #18 CLOSED)

| Q | Decision |
|---|----------|
| Q1 State mgmt | **Zustand** + separate event log for lineage/replay |
| Q2 Visualization | **Canvas 2D** for MVP |
| Q3 Energy budget | Radial solar dissipation from grid center (peak=10 at center) + **God Mode** control panel |
| Q4 First-play world | Pre-built barely-sustainable ecosystem spanning full ecological spectrum |

## Blockers

- **Dispatcher infra outage (2026-07-14 17:00 – 2026-07-15 02:00, #45)**: ~9.5hr near-total rc=1
  outage across worker/karen roles (lead partially functional). **Confirmed resolved** — 5+
  consecutive clean passes since 02:00. #45 closed. Root cause (OAuth expiry vs rate-limit vs
  credential-path difference) was never confirmed by the client and doesn't need to be — pattern
  fully recovered on its own.
- **Attempt-counter bug (#48, still open)**: `attempt_count` in dispatcher.sh counts worker-fail
  comments across an issue's *entire history*, never resetting on requeue. This caused #22, #23,
  #26, #31, #32, #33 to hit false `agent-blocked` states purely from the infra outage above, with
  zero real content-attempt failures. **This pass:** found `max_worker_attempts` had reverted to
  the default of 3 in `schedule.json` (an earlier stopgap bump to 10 never actually landed) — a
  requeue at exactly 3 lifetime attempts insta-blocks again with zero new dispatch under that
  default. Re-applied `max_worker_attempts: 10` in `schedule.json` (committed directly to main,
  operational/infra config) and manually relabeled **#32** `agent-blocked` → `agent-todo` with a
  comment explaining the requeue. Will revert the 3→10 bump once #48's proper self-resetting fix
  lands and closes.
